name: Eight Great Peanut Butter Sandwishes
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread peanut butter on one side of a slice of bread.
2. Add the desired toppings on top of the peanut butter, then spread yogurt over the mixture.
3. Top with chopped peanuts and finish with another layer of peanut butter.
4. For sandwich 2, spread peanut butter and celery on bread. Add yogurt, then more peanut butter.
5. Sprinkle cheddar cheese over sandwich 3.
6. Spread tahini, peanut butter, and raisins on sandwich 4. Mix in milk powder for a creamy texture.
7. Layer peanut butter, raisins, and apple slices on sandwich 5. Mix with non-fat milk powder and vanilla.
8. For sandwich 6, spread peanut butter on bread. Add alfalfa sprouts, sesame seeds, cucumber, mayonnaise, and finish with another layer of peanut butter.
9. Spread peanut butter on one side of a slice of bread for sandwich 7. Top with raisins and chopped apple.
10. Mash tofu and spread evenly on the other half of the bread for sandwich 8. Add remaining ingredients and finish with more peanut butter.
Serve these sandwiches cold, making them ideal for lunch or school.
